flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Western Nevada College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($11.4k → $12.8k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Western Nevada College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.7k → $4.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Western Nevada College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Western Nevada College rose 40% between 2021 and 2024 (29.4% → 41.0%).
